steps.title: Define variables and set up time equation
steps.content:
Let x be the number of large boxes and y be the number of small boxes.
Each large box takes 10 minutes, so the time spent on large boxes is 10x minutes.
Each small box takes 5 minutes, so the time spent on small boxes is 5y minutes.
The machine works exactly 700 minutes per day, giving:
$$10x + 5y = 700$$

steps.title: Backsolving — testing choice B
steps.content:
Backsolving — testing choice B (10x+5y=700):
The expression 10x+5y calculates the total minutes used: 10x for large boxes plus 5y for small boxes.
This matches the daily limit of 700 minutes, so the equation holds.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
